review_text: This app is honestly the best investment I made for test prep. The adaptive questions really helped me identify my weak areas in math. Went from a 1200 to a 1380 in two months. Only complaint is the app crashes sometimes when switching between sections. Would love a dark mode option too.

Absolutely useless. The practice questions are nothing like the actual AP exam. I studied exclusively with AP Classroom for AP US History and got a 2. The videos are boring and the progress tracking is broken half the time. Complete waste of time. I want my money back.

Sending scores should not cost $12 per school. This is a racket. Students are already paying to take the test and now you charge them again to send the results? Other testing services include score sends in the base price. Extremely disappointed.

Pretty good overall but needs more reading comprehension passages. The math section is excellent with great explanations but the reading section feels like an afterthought. Also the timer feature is helpful for building test stamina. 4 out of 5 stars.

The partnership with Khan Academy is the best thing College Board has done. Free high quality prep materials accessible to everyone regardless of income. Sal Khan explains concepts better than any tutor I have had. Improved my score by 150 points.

The AP Daily videos are actually quite good for AP Physics. My teacher assigns them as homework and they help reinforce concepts from class. The personal progress checks give immediate feedback. Much better than the old textbook approach.

The college search tool needs major improvements. The filters are too broad and the scholarship search returns results I am clearly not eligible for. I am a male student and it showed me women-only scholarships. Basic filtering should not be this hard.

Downloaded this for my daughter and she loves it. The gamification elements keep her motivated and she practices daily now without me nagging. The parent dashboard showing her progress is a nice touch. Would recommend to any parent of a high schooler.

Saved thousands of dollars in tuition by passing 4 CLEP exams. The study materials provided are decent but I supplemented with other resources. The testing experience at the Prometric center was smooth and professional. Results were instant which was great for my anxiety.

It took 3 weeks for my scores to arrive at my university even though it says electronic delivery. The tracking says delivered but the admissions office says they never received them. Now I have to pay again to resend. Unacceptable service for the price charged.

The explanations for wrong answers are incredibly detailed and actually teach you the concept instead of just showing the right answer. This is how learning should work. My only wish is that they added more vocabulary practice for the writing section.

I am a teacher and AP Classroom has made my life so much easier. The question bank is extensive and I can create custom assignments aligned to specific skills. The analytics showing which topics my students struggle with helps me adjust my teaching. Great tool for educators.
